rationale: No new qualitative change for Romania — Ukraine war continues at background level near the border, Iran deal stalled with no energy price relief, no Black Sea escalation reported.

top_events.title: Ukraine and Russia exchange cross-border attacks, three killed
top_events.summary: Ongoing war near Romania's border continues without new escalation. Black Sea security situation unchanged; no direct threat to Romanian territory this cycle.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Iran deal stalemate keeps energy price uncertainty alive for Romania. No relief on gas or oil costs confirmed; indirect cost-of-living pressure persists.

top_events.title: Pope Leo visits Canary Islands highlighting migrant journeys
top_events.summary: Migration pressure from Africa and eastern neighbors remains a background EU-wide topic. Limited direct impact on Romania but reflects ongoing migration dynamics relevant to the region.
